news_items.headline: Yankees' Trent Grisham has no structural damage to his left knee, tests show
news_items.summary: New York Yankees center fielder Trent Grisham was relieved that tests did not reveal any structural damage to his left knee a day after he exited a game in the fifth inning.

news_items.headline: Marlins top pitching prospect Robby Snelling to undergo season-ending elbow surgery
news_items.summary: Marlins left-hander Robby Snelling will undergo surgery to repair the ulnar collateral ligament in his left elbow, ending his season after just one major league start.
